title: Subscriptions
content:
Hourly Rate

The standard rate for one-on-one tutoring is $50 per hour. This includes personalized instruction, a detailed session recap, optional homework, email and text support between sessions, and regular progress tracking. Ideal for students needing focused help in a specific subject or occasional academic support.

Multi-Session Packages

Clients who commit to multiple sessions upfront receive discounted rates. All packages expire six months from the date of purchase.

PackageSessionsPriceYou Save
Bronze4 sessions (4 hours)$185$15
Silver8 sessions (8 hours)$365$35
Gold12 sessions (12 hours)$525$75

Package benefits include:

  • Bronze: Email support and progress reports.
  • Silver: Priority scheduling, extended email support, and detailed progress tracking.
  • Gold: Premium scheduling priority, 24/7 messaging support, comprehensive progress reports, and custom learning materials.

Group Sessions

For two to three students studying the same topic, group sessions are available at $35 per student per hour. This offers significant savings while maintaining quality instruction. Ideal for siblings, classmates, or study groups preparing for exams.

Payment Methods

We accept the following payment methods:

  • Cash
  • E-Transfer
  • PayPal
  • Bank Transfer

All payments are due at the time of service unless otherwise arranged. Package sessions must be prepaid in full before the first session is scheduled.
